title: Rascene: High-Fidelity 3D Scene Imaging with mmWave Communication Signals
authors: Kunzhe Song; Geo Jie Zhou; Xiaoming Liu; Huacheng Zeng
summary_cn: 利用毫米波 OFDM 通信信号进行三维场景成像，通过多帧空间自适应融合恢复几何一致性。
why_include_cn: 代表毫米波通信信号与三维成像结合的最新 ISAC 方向，关注低成本、可扩展的三维环境感知。
download_note: No final venue was verified at the time of curation; arXiv is recorded as the preprint source.

title: RIS-Aided Sensing: Experimental Validation of Radar 3D Imaging in the mmWave Band
authors: Sergio Micó-Rosa; Alvaro Villaescusa-Tebar; Saúl Fenollosa; Carlos Villena-Jiménez; Monika Drozdowska; Narcis Cardona
summary_cn: 将 FMCW 雷达、1-bit RIS 与 SFCW 测量结合，用于毫米波频段三维目标/场景重建验证。
why_include_cn: 展示可重构智能表面辅助毫米波三维成像的实验框架，适合作为新型硬件调制和三维重建参考。
download_note: No final venue was verified at the time of curation; arXiv is recorded as the preprint source.

title: 3D-Image Reconstruction using MIMO-SAR FMCW Radar
authors: Ayush Jha; Dhanireddy Chandrika; Chandra Sekhar Seelamantula; Chetan Singh Thakur
summary_cn: 结合 MIMO FMCW 虚拟阵列与合成孔径扫描，进行毫米波三维雷达图像重建。
why_include_cn: 直接覆盖 MIMO-SAR、FMCW 和三维毫米波成像，是雷达三维成像算法方向的高相关工作。
download_note: No final venue was verified at the time of curation; arXiv is recorded as the preprint source.

title: 3D Object Reconstruction with mmWave Radars
authors: Samah Hussein; Junfeng Guan; Swathi Narashiman; Saurabh Gupta; Haitham Hassanieh
summary_cn: RFconstruct 使用商用毫米波雷达进行三维物体形状重建，结合多雷达正交视角、时序融合和学习式补全。
why_include_cn: 面向稀疏、低角分辨和镜面反射等毫米波雷达挑战，提供系统级三维形状重建方案。
download_note: No final venue was verified at the time of curation; arXiv is recorded as the preprint source.

title: Diffusion-Based mmWave Radar Point Cloud Enhancement Driven by Range Images
authors: Ruixin Wu; Zihan Li; Jin Wang; Xiangyu Xu; Zhi Zheng; Kaixiang Huang; Guodong Lu
summary_cn: 用 range image 表示连接毫米波雷达点云增强与图像扩散模型，生成更稠密的类 LiDAR 三维点云。
why_include_cn: 关注毫米波点云稀疏和噪声问题，适合作为学习式点云增强和跨表示建模参考。
download_note: No final venue was verified at the time of curation; arXiv is recorded as the preprint source.

title: Enhancing mmWave Radar Point Cloud via Visual-inertial Supervision
authors: Cong Fan; Shengkai Zhang; Kezhong Liu; Shuai Wang; Zheng Yang; Wei Wang
summary_cn: mmEMP 用低成本相机与 IMU 监督毫米波雷达点云增强，处理动态对象和多径伪点问题。
why_include_cn: 代表视觉/惯性监督与毫米波雷达点云增强结合的方向，对低成本监督和多径抑制有参考价值。
download_note: No final venue was verified at the time of curation; arXiv is recorded as the preprint source.

title: 3DRIMR: 3D Reconstruction and Imaging via mmWave Radar based on Deep Learning
authors: Yue Sun; Zhuoming Huang; Honggang Zhang; Zhi Cao; Deqiang Xu
summary_cn: 3DRIMR 将毫米波雷达强度数据映射到深度图和三维点云，是学习式毫米波三维成像的早期代表。
why_include_cn: 作为毫米波雷达三维重建的基础工作，覆盖稀疏、低分辨、镜面反射和多径伪影等关键挑战。
download_note: No final venue was verified at the time of curation; arXiv is recorded as the preprint source.
